feature: Redis-backed NonceStore for @bolyra/gateway v0.2.0 — persistent, multi-instance replay protection

tasks.description: Add redis dependency, bump version to 0.2.0
Update config validation for redis store
Update CLI nonce store factory and banner

intake_context.source: User request (2026-06-19), deferred from gateway v0.1.0
intake_context.description: Replace in-process MemoryNonceStore with opt-in RedisNonceStore for multi-instance deployments. Nonces survive restarts and are shared across gateway replicas.
intake_context.approach: New RedisNonceStore class in @bolyra/gateway implementing the existing NonceStore interface from @bolyra/mcp. Uses Redis SET with NX+EX for atomic mark-if-fresh. Config via gateway.yaml nonce.store: 'redis' + nonce.redis.url. MemoryNonceStore remains the default.
intake_context.sellable_sentence: Deploy multiple gateway replicas behind a load balancer without worrying about nonce replay — RedisNonceStore shares replay protection state across all instances with zero config beyond a Redis URL.
